Excellence in Education

HomeAboutAdmissionsGalleryNews & EventsContact
Ages 6 months - 5 years

Nursery School

Where little minds begin their journey of discovery. Our nursery program provides a loving, safe environment where children learn through play and exploration.

Age Groups

We offer programs tailored to each developmental stage of your child

Creche
6 months - 2 years

Loving care in a safe, stimulating environment

Toddlers
2 - 3 years

Developing motor skills and social awareness

Pre-Nursery
3 - 4 years

Introduction to structured learning activities

Nursery
4 - 5 years

Preparing for primary school transition

Learning Areas

Our play-based curriculum covers all areas of early childhood development

Early Literacy

Phonics, letter recognition, and early reading skills

Numeracy

Counting, shapes, patterns, and basic math concepts

Creative Arts

Drawing, painting, crafts, and creative expression

Music & Movement

Singing, dancing, and rhythm activities

Social Skills

Sharing, cooperation, and emotional development

Physical Development

Gross and fine motor skills through play

Why Choose Our Nursery?

At Elyon Nursery School, we believe that every child is unique and deserves the best start in life. Our experienced teachers create a warm, stimulating environment where your child will thrive.

Qualified and caring teachers
Safe and colorful learning environment
Nutritious meals and snacks
Regular parent-teacher communication
Age-appropriate learning materials
Outdoor play area
Health and safety protocols
Small class sizes for individual attention

Nurturing Young Minds

Since 1994

School Hours

Monday - Friday
8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

Extended care available until 5:00 PM

Class Size

Maximum 15 children
per class

1:5 teacher-to-child ratio

What to Bring

Change of clothes
Water bottle

Lunch provided by the school

Ready to Give Your Child the Best Start?

Join our nurturing community and watch your child blossom. Admissions are open for the new academic year.

Footer

Elyon Schools

Est. 1994

Nurturing young minds from Nursery through Secondary education. Building tomorrow's leaders with excellence in academics, character, and values.
